title: calcitrapa araneosa
intro: Calcitrapa araneosa, also known as the spider-net melon, is a type of plant in the family Amaranthaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Calcitrapa araneosa include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and treat various skin conditions. Calcitrapa araneosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
